data.body: ddbe plan-review remediation: round 1 BLOCK (6 findings) -> enriched with config-pointer design, type-registration sites, git-email fallbacks -> round 2 BLOCK (2 findings, review grounded MORE exempt sites: _engine_support/gates.py _GATE_EXEMPT_TYPES, _commands/gates.py:118 claim gate, transition_close.py:99 close gate, orchestrator.py:563 drift_refresh, composer.py:41 _FILE_IMPACT_EXEMPT_TYPES) -> round 3 final enrichment (all sites named, AC2 -> concrete show --output llm JSON assertion, keys[] = authorized-keys line strings no separate algorithm field, mappings CLI --mapping p:id, git subprocess degradation, export side-effect accepted). Re-running review. NOTE: types.py is GENERATED (python -m rebar.schemas.gen_types); source of truth = schemas/common.schema.json.
